task_objective: Nail Art Detail Page Generation - Create comprehensive 4-column nail design showcase page from sketch and inspiration images

structure_reference.focus: Nail shapes, nail count, proportions, spacing, curvature, and layout composition - ABSOLUTE PRESERVATION REQUIRED

aesthetic_reference.focus: Colors, patterns, styling mood, material textures, and artistic aesthetics
aesthetic_reference.role: Provide aesthetic foundation for nail design generation

model_type.description: Select model type for hand presentation, skin tone auto-adapts to selected type

workflow.role: Professional Nail Art Director & Detail Page Designer

steps.step_1_inspiration_analysis: Comprehensive analysis of Input 2 inspiration: extract core visual features including colors, textures, mood, pattern elements, and artistic aesthetics. Generate artistic description, bullet-point analysis, and mood keywords.
steps.step_2_sketch_design_generation: Generate nail sketch design based on Input 1 nail shape sketch with inspiration aesthetics from Input 2. STRICTLY preserve Input 1's nail count, positions, shapes, contours, proportions, spacing, curvature, and layout. Apply inspiration-derived design elements onto the locked structure.
steps.step_3_render_generation: Generate high-fidelity rendered nail effect image from the sketch design with realistic materials, textures, gloss, and lighting. Produce polish material recommendations, craftsmanship suggestions, and style positioning analysis.
steps.step_4_presentation_generation: Generate four-column detail page including inspiration showcase, line art design, rendered effect, and hand-wearing presentation using selected model type.

output_requirements: ABSOLUTE preservation of Input 1 nail shape structure across all outputs
Aesthetic elements from Input 2 applied exclusively to nail design
Model type selection (Asian/Caucasian/African) with auto-adapted skin tone
Color system MUST be extracted from the inspiration image (Input 2)
Nail design in wear views and campaign image MUST be 100% identical to Column 3 render
Hand-wearing view details: back of hand pose and clenched fist pose
Campaign image: back of hand with nails near face, facial features match hand skin tone

outputs.column_1: Inspiration Showcase - Display Input 2 inspiration image with AI-generated artistic description, key visual feature analysis bullet points, and mood keywords (6-8 words, Chinese-English对照).
outputs.column_2: Nail Line Art Design - Generate nail sketch design based on Input 1 structure with Input 2 aesthetics applied. STRICTLY preserve Input 1's nail shape, count, and layout. Include AI-generated shape translation logic bullet points.
outputs.column_3: Rendered Effect - High-fidelity rendered nail design with realistic materials, textures, gloss, and lighting. Include AI-generated polish material recommendations, craftsmanship suggestions, and style positioning analysis.
outputs.column_4: Hand Presentation - Dual views: (1) back of hand pose showing nail design, (2) clenched fist pose showing nails on visible fingers. Both views use selected model type with matching skin tone.

campaign_image.description: Brand campaign image - back of hand wearing the nail design from Column 3, gently positioned near face with facial features matching the selected model's hand skin tone. High-end fashion photography style.
campaign_image.consistency: Nail design MUST be 100% identical to Column 3 rendered effect

ai_copywriting.inspiration_description: Analyze Input 2 inspiration image and generate an 80-word artistic description highlighting core visual features.
ai_copywriting.visual_features: Extract 4-5 key visual features from inspiration image as bullet points.
ai_copywriting.mood_keywords: Extract 6-8 mood keywords with Chinese-English translation.
ai_copywriting.material_recommendations: List 4-5 recommended polish materials with descriptions.
ai_copywriting.craftsmanship_suggestions: List 4-5 craftsmanship suggestions with icon identifiers.
ai_copywriting.style_analysis: Analyze series style: brand positioning, target audience, user persona.
ai_copywriting.dna_mapping: List 5-6 pairs of inspiration elements to nail design elements correspondences.
